creator: jhs-list@berklix.com
text:
Fix obsolete URL in current/ports/sysutils/cdrtools-cjk/pkg-descr

Fix: 

Please delete obsolete
http://www.fokus.gmd.de/research/cc/glone/employees/joerg.schilling/private/cdrecord.html
	Please insert
http://cdrecord.berlios.de/private/cdrecord.html
	By joerg.schilling, author of Cdrtools inc cdrecord.

Cc'd marius@FreeBSD.org 
	although sysutils/cdrtools-cjk/Makefile has no MAINTAINER=
	he is MAINTAINER for cdrtools-devel/Makefile & cdrtools/Makefile

Cc'd Joerg.Schilling@fokus.fraunhofer.de after this post & follow up:
	> Date: Mon, 29 Jun 2009 10:27:55 +0200
	> To: freebsd-multimedia@freebsd.org, dfpleal@gmail.com
	> what is the reason for using a 5 year old cdrtools version?
	> Are there no updates on FreeBSD?
